titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Biological Safety Advisory Committee, School of Medicine, Yale University, Records
Biological Safety Advisory Committee, School of Medicine, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 13, 2020 at 11:51

did.unittitle: Biological Safety Advisory Committee, School of Medicine, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, reports, articles, minutes, and memoranda documenting the operations of the Yale Biological Safety Advisory Committee.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 27-D (YRG 27-D), Records of committees of the Yale School of Medicine.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Biological Safety Advisory Committee, School of Medicine, Yale University, Records (RU 458). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, reports, articles, minutes, and memoranda documenting the operations of the Yale Biological Safety Advisory Committee.

corpname.part: Yale University. Biological Safety Advisory Committee

did.unittitle: Re: Formation of Corrunittee on Virological Hazards & guidelines for research
Re: Guidelines for Recombinant DNA research
Re: Dr. Bhatt's proposal to study ectromelia virus
Memorandums of Understanding & Agreement and approval sheets
Altman, S./McCorckle, G.; Eisenstadt, Jerome; Francke, Bertold; Francke, Uta; Gilbert, Walter (Harvard)
Weisman, Sherman M. Re: Reclassification of lab (to P3 level)
Safety Manual for Biological Research Laboratories
Bugetary Matters: Charges for Biosafety services
Safety Guidelines, Revision, to Art Ross
Yale University Physical Department Safety Manual
Laboratory of Epidemiology and Public Health
Safety Guidelines for working with Slow Viruses
DBS and BSAC Notes and Phonecalls
Yale Arbovirus Research Unit File Downgrading of agents
A Handbook of Operational Procedures for P-2 and P-3 [Recembiran(?)]: DNA Laboratories
